AutoVehicleRenamer.StarQ_Option.ApplyToA: Apply the selected settings to all vehicles on the current save. Helpful after installing the mod for the first time or after renaming an existing depot/origin building.
AutoVehicleRenamer.StarQ_Option.EnableDe: Rename vehicles from buildings with default names
Allow auto renaming of vehicles from buildings with default names.
AutoVehicleRenamer.StarQ_Option.Separato: Type what you want as the character(s) you want as the separator among the vehicle name and origin name. Using emoji or other unsupported characters might crash the game.
AutoVehicleRenamer.StarQ_Option.TextForm: Select one of the text formatting to use for renaming.
AutoVehicleRenamer.StarQ_Option.RestoreD: Disables renaming vehicles from buildings with default names, sets the separator to <•>, and sets the format to <{AutoVehicleRenamer.Replacement.Vehicle_Separator_Building}>
AutoVehicleRenamer.StarQ_OptionWarning.R: Confirm restore defaults settings for Auto Vehicle Renamer?
